citation.authority: Bath Inventory of Carbon and Energy (ICE) v3 — Hammond & Jones, University of Bath / Circular Ecology
citation.document_section: ICE v3 dataset entry: Aluminium, general (primary), 8.24 kgCO2e/kg
citation.regulatory_limit_note: ICE v3 public mean for primary aluminium extrusion is 8.24 kgCO2e/kg = 8240 kgCO2e/tonne, used directly. Production: replace with the supplier-issued EPD (e.g., via EC3 or One Click LCA) for the specific rack profile + alloy + recycled-content fraction.

citation.authority: Building Transparency / EC3 (Embodied Carbon in Construction Calculator)
citation.document_section: EC3 ready-mix concrete category, 4000 psi (27.6 MPa) typical industry-average GWP
citation.regulatory_limit_note: EC3 + Bath ICE v3 public range for 4000 psi ready-mix is roughly 150–300 kgCO2e/m³ depending on cement content + SCM substitution; 220 kgCO2e/yd³ ≈ 168 kgCO2e/m³, mid-low. Production: pull the regional NRMCA Type III EPD for the specific mix design (cement type, SCM%, w/c ratio).

citation.authority: Bath ICE v3 / industry-average Type III EPD for insulated glazing units
citation.document_section: Float glass + IGU assembly (frame excluded) — public ICE v3 entry
citation.regulatory_limit_note: Float glass alone is ~1.4 kgCO2e/kg per ICE v3; insulated glazing units add spacer + low-E coating + sealant + 2nd pane, landing at ~1.45 kgCO2e/kg in industry-average EPDs. Production: replace with the GANA / IGMA Type III EPD on the specific unit assembly.

citation.authority: Concrete Reinforcing Steel Institute (CRSI) Industry-Average EPD for fabricated reinforcing steel
citation.document_section: CRSI Type III EPD — US-mix EAF rebar, cradle-to-gate, declared unit 1 tonne
citation.regulatory_limit_note: CRSI / Bath ICE v3 US-mix EAF rebar range is roughly 0.9–1.4 kgCO2e/kg = 900–1400 kgCO2e/tonne. 1100 kgCO2e/tonne is a midpoint. Production: substitute the supplier's EPD (mill-specific scrap %, electricity grid mix matter).

citation.authority: American Institute of Steel Construction (AISC) Industry-Average EPD for fabricated structural sections
citation.document_section: AISC Type III EPD — US-mix EAF hot-rolled wide-flange, cradle-to-gate, declared unit 1 tonne
citation.regulatory_limit_note: AISC / Bath ICE v3 US-mix EAF structural sections range is roughly 0.8–1.2 kgCO2e/kg = 800–1200 kgCO2e/tonne; 1000 kgCO2e/tonne is the AISC industry-average. Production: substitute the mill's plant-specific EPD.
